body.title: Review and optimize context-load: directory tree + source map + drift prevention
body.result: Done in two prior sessions (CC + Opus rounds). Closing stale ticket.
body.description: Context load needs review after significant drift in session 2026-04-10c. Start with directory-style tree view of everything that gets loaded, where each item is sourced from (DB, file, env, machines.json), and where fallback/mirror copies live (e.g. decisions_log.dsb is file but also in docs_entries DB table). Map: what's authoritative, what's derived, what's stale-prone. Then optimize load order and content for drift prevention — machine specs, model inventory, routing state should be verifiable at load time, not assumed.
